applied_optimizations.name: Triton fused logsumexp+relu kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused logsumexp+relu Triton kernel with tl.math.exp and tl.math.log for ROCm compatibility. Kernel is correct but 7% slower due to massive launch overhead (1M+ programs for 4*16*128*128 spatial locations).

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile wrapper
attempted_but_failed.reason: MLIR compilation failure with Triton on ROCm

attempted_but_failed.name: Multi-spatial per program kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correctness issues with loop handling in Triton
attempted_but_failed.error: Output mismatch due to incorrect bounds handling

notes: Conv3d dominates at ~90% of runtime - optimizing logsumexp+relu alone cannot achieve significant speedup
Triton kernel launch overhead is prohibitive for 1M+ programs
Maximum theoretical speedup from optimizing logsumexp+relu is ~6%
torch.compile fails with MLIR errors on this ROCm/Triton version
Current Triton implementation: SCORE 50 (correct but slower)
Task requires Triton @triton.jit kernels - requirement met but speedup not achievable due to problem characteristics

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output (agent got stuck for the 3rd consecutive time). With 32 minutes remaining, giving one final attempt with an extremely detailed, near-complete solution structure.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent produced no output for 4 consecutive trials. With 31 minutes left, giving one final attempt with a complete, copy-paste-ready solution. The fused maxpool+logsumexp+relu kernel should save memory

global_notes: Level 2 Problem 43 is dominated by conv3d operation (~90% of runtime)
The logsumexp+relu fusion target is only 5-6% of total runtime
To achieve significant speedup, would need to optimize conv3d which is already highly optimized in MIOpen
torch.compile is not functional on this ROCm/Triton version due to MLIR backend issues
Triton kernel implementation meets task requirements but cannot achieve speedup due to launch overhead and limited optimization scope
